SARAH CHEN
Senior Product Manager
Berlin, Germany | sarah.chen@email.com | +49 151 234 56789
linkedin.com/in/sarahchen-pm

SUMMARY
Product manager with 5 years of experience building financial and e-commerce products.
Experienced in cross-functional collaboration with engineering, design, data, and compliance.
Based in Berlin, looking to move into a Head of Product or VP of Product role.

EXPERIENCE

Senior Product Manager — Finleap Connect, Berlin (Jan 2022 – Present)
- Led product strategy for open banking API platform
- Launched PSD2 compliance features across Germany, Austria, and Spain
- Worked closely with enterprise clients to define API requirements
- Collaborated with engineering, legal, and compliance teams on regulatory projects
- Managed product roadmap and quarterly planning

Product Manager — SumUp, Berlin (Mar 2019 – Dec 2021)
- Owned the merchant onboarding flow end-to-end
- Ran A/B tests and user research sessions to improve conversion
- Wrote product specs, user stories, and acceptance criteria for engineering teams
- Coordinated with growth, marketing, and support on go-to-market launches

Associate Product Manager — Zalando, Berlin (Jul 2017 – Feb 2019)
- Supported senior PMs on checkout and payments features
- Conducted competitor analysis and user interviews
- Maintained product backlog and prioritisation frameworks

EDUCATION
M.Sc. Information Systems — Humboldt University Berlin, 2017
B.Sc. Business Administration — University of Mannheim, 2015

SKILLS
Product Management, Agile / Scrum, User Research, A/B Testing, SQL, Figma,
JIRA, Confluence, Python (basic), Data Analysis, Stakeholder Management,
API Products, FinTech, Open Banking, PSD2, Roadmap Planning

LANGUAGES
English (fluent), German (fluent), Mandarin (native)

CERTIFICATIONS
Pragmatic Institute — Product Management Certification, 2020
